====''Pokémon the Series: Black & White''====
Roxie appeared in ''[[BW083|Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 1]]'' and ''[[BW084|Part 2]]''. Like the {{pkmn|games}}, she is a musician who plays the bass guitar. She fronts [[Unova]]'s top punk rock band named "Koffing and the Toxics", with {{tc|Roughneck}} {{un|Nicky}} and {{tc|Guitarist}} [[Billy Jo]] as the other members.

She is also a powerful [[Gym Leader]], defeating everyone who dared to challenge her with only three Pokémon even when they challenged her with six. When {{Ash}} arrived at her Gym, she was thrilled to see his {{AP|Pikachu}}, as she too had a Pokémon originating from [[Kanto]], {{p|Koffing}}, and happily accepted his challenge.

Roxie defeated five out of six of Ash's Pokémon, except for Pikachu, who knocked out Roxie's {{p|Garbodor}}. When she was defeated, she happily congratulated Ash as the crowd cheered for his victory, and she presented him with his eighth and final [[Unova]] Badge, the {{Badge|Toxic}}.

She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[BW103|Curtain Up, Unova League!]]''.
